children.name: SyncMarketplaceHandler

HermesDecisionEngine.determineAutonomy
suggest_only
sends everything to pending_review
full_auto
auto-applies normal suggestions
still routes critical competitor price detections to review
balanced
auto-applies safe types only
routes non-safe types to review
HermesDecisionEngine.run
auto-applies a safe info suggestion under full_auto and persists events
keeps suggestions pending under suggest_only

forces review when the change exceeds maxAutoPriceChangePct, even under full_auto
forces review when the new margin is below minMarginFloor, even under full_auto

IDOR: workspace A cannot reach workspace B resources (S2)
GET /products/:idB -> 404
PATCH /products/:idB -> 404 (no mutation)
DELETE /products/:idB -> 404 (no delete)
GET /products/:idB/listings -> 404
GET /listings/:idB -> 404
PATCH /listings/:idB (price) -> 404
POST /listings/:idB/publish -> 404 (no cross-tenant publish)
GET /marketplaces/:idB -> 404
POST /hermes/events/:idB/approve -> 404 (event untouched)
GET /hermes/events/:idB -> 404
PATCH /workspaces/:idB operates on the caller OWN workspace, not B
GET /workspaces/:idB returns the caller OWN workspace (A)
